requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs SAE J1772 AC / CCS1 DC
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与交流SAE J1772 / 直流CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與交流SAE J1772 / 直流CCS1

summary.en: Trinidad and Tobago is a 60 Hz Americas market with a US-heritage electrical environment. The practical EV connector ecosystem is SAE J1772 (Type 1) for AC charging and CCS1 for DC fast charging. SAE J1772 uses proximity pilot and control pilot functions for AC conductive charging, while CCS1 adds DC power pins below the J1772 interface for fast charging. This connector choice should be confirmed for each tender, site owner, vehicle fleet, and charge-point operator, but exporters should treat SAE J1772 and CCS1 as the default Trinidad and Tobago-ready hardware path.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥是60 Hz美洲市场，电气环境承袭美国体系。实务上的电动汽车接口体系为交流充电SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流快充CCS1。SAE J1772采用接近导引和控制导引功能进行交流传导充电，CCS1在J1772接口下方增加直流功率引脚用于快充。每个招标、场地方、车辆车队和充电点运营商仍应逐项确认接口选择，但出口商应将SAE J1772和CCS1视为面向特立尼达和多巴哥的默认硬件路径。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥是60 Hz美洲市場，電氣環境承襲美國體系。實務上的電動汽車接口體系為交流充電SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流快充CCS1。SAE J1772採用接近導引和控制導引功能進行交流傳導充電，CCS1在J1772接口下方增加直流功率引脚用於快充。每個招標、場地方、車輛車隊和充電點運營商仍應逐項確認接口選擇，但出口商應將SAE J1772和CCS1視為面向千里達及托巴哥的默認硬件路徑。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — SAE Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler for AC charging
CCS1 — Combined Charging System 1 DC fast-charging connector ecosystem
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project, fleet, or charge-point-operator connector specifications in Trinidad and Tobago

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 DC communication. These connectors are physically incompatible with SAE J1772 and CCS1 vehicle inlets. GB/T 27930 CAN-based DC communication is also not the communication path used for CCS1 deployments. GB/T chargers therefore need connector hardware, cable assembly, locking, signalling, labels, tests, and DC communication redesign before use in Trinidad and Tobago.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并使用GB/T 27930直流通信。这些接口与SAE J1772和CCS1车辆接口在物理上不兼容。GB/T 27930基于CAN的直流通信也不是CCS1部署所用通信路径。因此，GB/T充电桩在特立尼达和多巴哥使用前，需要对接口硬件、电缆组件、锁止、信号、标签、测试和直流通信进行重新设计。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並使用GB/T 27930直流通訊。這些接口與SAE J1772和CCS1車輛接口在物理上不兼容。GB/T 27930基於CAN的直流通訊也不是CCS1部署所用通訊路徑。因此，GB/T充電樁在千里達及托巴哥使用前，需要對接口硬件、電纜組件、鎖止、信號、標籤、測試和直流通訊進行重新設計。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to BMS communication

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger cannot be plugged into SAE J1772 or CCS1 vehicles. Conversion requires redesign of the coupler, inlet or cable set, contact geometry, locking system, proximity pilot and control pilot behaviour, thermal rise evidence, cable ratings, spare parts, labels, and DC communication stack. Adapters are not a substitute for project-compliant connector hardware. Exporters should confirm SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC in the specific Trinidad and Tobago project before quoting or shipping.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩无法插入SAE J1772或CCS1车辆接口。转换需要重新设计耦合器、车辆端接口或电缆组、触点几何、锁止系统、接近导引和控制导引行为、温升证据、电缆额定值、备件、标签和直流通信栈。转接器不能替代项目合规接口硬件。出口商在报价或发货前，应在具体特立尼达和多巴哥项目中确认交流使用SAE J1772、直流使用CCS1。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁無法插入SAE J1772或CCS1車輛接口。轉換需要重新設計耦合器、車輛端接口或電纜組、觸點幾何、鎖止系統、接近導引和控制導引行為、溫升證據、電纜額定值、備件、標籤和直流通訊棧。轉接器不能替代項目合規接口硬件。出口商在報價或發貨前，應在具體千里達及托巴哥項目中確認交流使用SAE J1772、直流使用CCS1。

mandatory_status.target: Project-critical — SAE J1772 AC and CCS1 DC are the applicable Americas connector path for Trinidad and Tobago unless a project specification states otherwise; physical incompatibility makes GB/T substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a SAE J1772 / CCS1 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector localisation is mandatory in practice: use SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC unless the Trinidad and Tobago project owner specifies otherwise. GB/T connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication are not plug-compatible or protocol-compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口本地化在实务上属于必要事项：除非特立尼达和多巴哥项目业主另有规定，交流应使用SAE J1772，直流应使用CCS1。GB/T接口和GB/T 27930直流通信不具备插接或协议兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口本地化在實務上屬於必要事項：除非千里達及托巴哥項目業主另有規定，交流應使用SAE J1772，直流應使用CCS1。GB/T接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊不具備插接或協議兼容性。
